rationale.fidelity: Preserves the five-minute operational cutoff, routing and start-time decisions, constraints, objective, and search-ordering mechanism.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly links early incumbent quality to the release deadline and execution while separating that pathway from unproven downstream gains; the actor is only implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Avoids novelty or superiority positioning beyond the supplied material; scholarly positioning is not requested.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats apparent early quality as a hypothesis and specifies comparative, controlled, statistical evidence.
rationale.overall: An excellent concise answer that fully separates operational logic from untested performance.
